zh.lifeSummary: 當Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach於1129年出生時，他的父親Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern46歲，母親Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf26歲。他與Benedicta von Donauwörth結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1189年8月18日享年60歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 達豪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach于1129年出生时，他的父亲Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern46岁，母亲Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf26岁。他与Benedicta von Donauwörth结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1189年8月18日享年60岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 達豪。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach was born in 1129, his father, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, was 46 and his mother, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, was 26. He married Benedicta von Donauwörth. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 18 August 1189, at the age of 60, and was buried in Dachau, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach est né en 1129, son père, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Benedicta von Donauwörth. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 août 1189, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach 1129 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern 46 und seine Mutter Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf 26. Er hat Benedicta von Donauwörth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. August 1189 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach è nato il nel 1129, il suo padre, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Benedicta von Donauwörth. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 agosto 1189, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Germania.

ja.Ensdorf, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germa: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチエンスドルフ
ja.Amberg-Sultzbach, Bayern, Germany: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ウンテラルグaウアンバーグ
ja.Kloster Indersdorf, Dachau, Bayern, Deut: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ダチャウ
ja.lifeSummary: Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbachが1129年に生まれた時，父Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayernは46歳，母Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorfは26歳であった。Benedicta von Donauwörthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年8月18日に60歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ダチャウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach(이)가 1129년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Benedicta von Donauwörth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년 8월 18일 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 다차우에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach nasceu em 1129, seu pai, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Benedicta von Donauwörth. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1189, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach родился в 1129 г., его отцу по имени Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Benedicta von Donauwörth. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 августа 1189 г. в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ландкрис дачао, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pfalzgraf Otto VII von Wittelsbach nació en 1129, su papá, Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Benedicta von Donauwörth. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1189, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Alemania.
